title: Lead Investment Banker at National Insurance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at National Insurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, National Insurance in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About National Insurance:
National Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with National Insurance!
